Note: 1. The main materials for plastic-steel doors and windows: triethylene ethylene rubber strips; profile wall thickness is 2.5mm; galvanized steel subframe 1.5mm; 4mm float glass (vacuum glass); hardware accessories are medium-grade or above. It includes installation, foaming agent, and auxiliary materials (connectors, screws, packaging, nails, springs, etc.).  
   2. The main materials for aluminum alloy doors and windows: profile wall thickness 1.4mm, steel supplementary frame wall thickness 1.8mm; hardware accessories are domestic medium-grade or above; 5mm float glass (vacuum glass). Profiles are YT65 domestic powder-coated heat-insulating profiles. It includes installation, foaming agent, and auxiliary materials (connectors, screws, packaging, nails, springs, etc.).  
   3. All materials in this guidance price information are products with complete three certificates.  
   4. The "price information" in this appendix is the difference between the budget price and the budget price within the quota; the price difference is taxed only.  
   5. The "price information" in this appendix requires conversion if the actual unit price is needed; the conversion density is determined through negotiation between the parties.
